content.en:
Dark God True Kingdom.

As the most powerful of the five major forces, the Void Heaven True Kingdom is ready to attack the Dark God True Kingdom.

Judging from the number of half-step True Ancestors and True Monarchs, the Void Heaven True Kingdom is indeed inferior to the Dark God True Kingdom, but because of Ye Tian's existence, the Dark God True Kingdom will undoubtedly be defeated.

This is also the reason why the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor asked Ye Tian to take action to destroy the Five True Kingdoms!

If there was no Ye Tian's existence, no matter how angry the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was, he would not be able to destroy the Five True Kingdoms.

After all, under the current circumstances, Dao Ancestor could not enter the Quasi-Dao Realm, at most he would send Dao Ancestor incarnations to enter the Quasi-Dao Realm.

However, if the Void Heaven Sect sent more than 100 Dao Ancestor incarnations to deal with the Five True Kingdoms, the other forces would probably not agree, and they were also worried that the more than 100 Dao Ancestor incarnations of the Void Heaven Sect would attack their True Kingdom.

In addition, a group of Dao Ancestor incarnations took action to destroy the true country, which in itself is a problem worthy of criticism.

Therefore, there is no problem in letting the Void Heaven True Kingdom make a move, it is completely a contest at the same level, even if the five Great True Kingdoms are destroyed, the other forces will not say anything.

The dark god is really abroad.

The countless True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall and many half-step True Ancestors have descended here.

In this battle, only the True Monarch is qualified to participate in the war, and the Heavenly Monarch has no chance to participate, after all, the Heavenly Monarch is too weak to even be qualified as cannon fodder.

Ye Tian led all the combat power of the Void Heaven Palace, and no one else would be dissatisfied.

With Ye Tian's strong strength, all the half-step True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Hall were very recognized, and they were also very relieved, otherwise they really wouldn't have the confidence to attack the Dark God True Kingdom.

"Wanfa Daozi, what do you mean by this?"

A message came from the Dark God True Realm and asked.

The person who opened his mouth was the Ghost Shadow True Monarch of the Dark God Temple, who had encountered a disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect in the Wuji Abyss, and after luckily not dying, he withdrew from the Wuji Abyss and returned to the Dark God True Kingdom.

In terms of strength, he definitely belongs to the top level in the Dark God True Kingdom.

But the Ghost Shadow True Monarch knew his strength very well, and he couldn't even beat any disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect, but Ye Tian could easily slaughter the disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect, and the strength of the two was not at the same level.

Therefore, the Ghost Shadow True Monarch was also very nervous, but he had to speak.

But Ye Tian didn't bother to pay attention to the Ghost Shadow True Monarch at all, and directly led the countless powerhouses of the Void Heaven Hall to make a move.

Bang!!!!

The true kingdom barrier of the Dark God True Kingdom was directly torn apart, and countless Void Heaven Hall True Monarchs and half-step True Ancestors entered the Dark God True Kingdom.

Then.

Ye Tian sacrificed a strange thing and merged into the void, resisting the suppression from the true kingdom.

Under normal circumstances, when outsiders enter the Dark God True Kingdom, the Dark God True Kingdom can use the power of the True Kingdom to suppress the enemy, and even increase their own strength.

But this situation is not impossible to deal with, the strange thing that Ye Tian sacrificed can temporarily resist the suppression of the Dark God True Kingdom, but this kind of strange thing is also relatively rare, it was given to him by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to deal with this battle.

There are few such similar strange things, and there are few in the Void Sky vein.

But in order to destroy the Dark God True Kingdom, the Void Sky is not stingy to take out such a strange thing.

Bang!!!!

The countless True Monarchs and Heavenly Monarchs of the Dark God True Kingdom formed battle formations one after another, among which three half-step True Ancestors and thousands of top True Monarchs formed a battle formation and killed Ye Tian.

The battle formation is not as large as possible, if the cooperation is not tacit, too many people will lead to a great drop in power.

Therefore, the large array formed by these three half-step True Ancestors and thousands of top True Monarchs was already their limit, and they could just exert their strongest power.

In the eyes of the Dark God True Kingdom, although they can't defeat Ye Tian together, they can at least stop Ye Tian!

At this moment, Ye Tian was hesitating whether to use the Dao technique or not.

Once he casts the Dao technique, the fact that he has a Dao-level natal talent is estimated to be exposed.

"Although Dao-level natal talent cannot be born with it, it is not only one channel for the Talent Ancestral Pool, but other channels are too difficult, but the Talent Ancestral Pool can continuously give birth to Dao-level natal talents, which is why it is so famous!

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he was not ready to hide his Dao technique.

"Sky Splitting!"

The terrifying power of the space Dao technique tore through everything, only to see that the void where the battle array was located directly collapsed, and the bodies of the three half-step True Ancestors and thousands of top True Monarchs were directly torn apart and shattered, and they fell and died in an instant.

Outside.

Many Dao Ancestor incarnations were watching this battle, and naturally noticed Ye Tian's move.

Suddenly, countless Dao Ancestors were shocked.

"Dao Technique! How is it possible! Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son is only a half-step True Ancestor, how can he perform Dao Technique?"

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is actually able to perform Dao techniques, and he has also cultivated them to the consummation realm, I'm afraid he has Dao-level natal talent!"

"Wanfa Daozi has not entered the talent ancestral pool, where did the Dao-level natal talent come from?"

"Talent Ancestral Pool is not the only place where you can obtain Dao-level natal talent, it's just that it's very difficult to get through other methods, it seems that Wanfa Daozi has a real chance to defy the sky, so he has obtained Dao-level natal talent, this luck is ......"

All of a sudden, many Dao Ancestors were jealous.

Ye Tian can obtain Dao-level natal talent, if that opportunity is given to them, they can also obtain Dao-level natal talent!

Once they have obtained a Dao-level natal talent, their strength cannot be improved in a short period of time, but in the long run, their strength will inevitably increase a lot.

On the battlefield of the Dark God True Kingdom.

Ye Tian used the Void Splitting Technique and killed a large number of True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors, and almost none of them could block his casual blow.

Even if there are many True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors who have life-saving things, they can't save their lives, and they die one after another!

As time passed, the number of half-step True Ancestors in the Dark God True Kingdom became smaller and smaller, and the number of True Monarchs became smaller and smaller, and they began to rout.

Three days later.

Except for a few half-step True Ancestors and some True Monarchs, the powerhouses of the Dark God True Kingdom were almost completely wiped out.

Next, the Void Heaven Temple began to sweep the Dark God True Kingdom, pulling out all the foundations of the Dark God Temple, and as for the countless living beings in the Dark God True Kingdom, they accepted them one by one.

These can also be regarded as the foundation of the Void Heaven True Kingdom in the future, and there is no need to destroy them.

And those half-step True Ancestors and True Monarchs who escaped were also hunted down by Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's tracking ability was so terrifying, these half-step True Ancestors and True Monarchs couldn't escape at all, and even one of the half-step True Ancestors escaped into the battlefield ruins and the fragments of the Infinite Abyss, and was also found by Ye Tian and killed them one by one.

After the Void Heaven Temple was repaired for a year, it successively attacked the Blood Moon True Kingdom, the Soul Devouring True Kingdom, the Demon Sound True Kingdom, and the Three-Eyed Tail Horn True Kingdom.

These four true kingdoms have long known the situation of the headquarters forces in the chaos, and they have no heart to fight at all, and nearly ninety percent of the strong people have fled from the true kingdom, and even withdrew from their respective forces and switched to other forces.

The Void Heaven Temple also had no way to hunt down and kill those who switched to other factions, so it only slaughtered the people of the Four True Kingdoms.

In such a situation, the Four True Kingdoms have no resistance at all, and there will be no support.

In just ten days, the four true kingdoms were all destroyed!

At this point, the five true kingdoms have all disappeared, and the Void Heaven True Kingdom has also lost a lot, but this time it has swallowed the wealth of the five true kingdoms at once, and it can definitely cultivate a large number of true monarchs and half-step true ancestors again in a short period of time.

Therefore, the Void Heaven True Country is definitely earned this time!

And Ye Tian, as a leader, has also gained a lot, and has obtained a lot of inheritances and multi-sect Taoist inheritances, and there is no shortage of inheritances all of a sudden.

After destroying the Five True Kingdoms, the Void Heaven True Kingdom and the Void Heaven Temple began to fall silent.

At this time, the eyes of the other forces were all attracted by the Infinite Abyss Ruins.

After the Infinite Abyss fragments were sent out one by one, some forces also began to give birth to Dao Ancestors one after another, but each force basically only gave birth to one or two Dao Ancestors, which was too much worse than the progress of the Void Heaven One Vein.

In just a few hundred years, the number of Dao Ancestors in the Void Heaven One Vein was too terrifying, and it had already exceeded 200.

At the beginning, many forces still wanted to suppress or even destroy the Void Heaven Pulse, but with the Void Heaven Pulse having more than 200 Dao Ancestors, many forces were instigated.

What shocked countless top forces and transcendent forces even more was that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor showed the strength of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor and suppressed all the Dao Ancestors at once.

The Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor has always only had the four transcendent forces, and it is easy to suppress the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and even the transcendent forces will not use a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor casually.

And with the Void Heaven First Vein having a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, the Void Heaven First Vein suddenly entered the ranks of transcendent forces, becoming the fifth transcendent force in this Chaos Realm, and was recognized by the four transcendent forces.

Subsequently, a message was delivered.

The reason why so many Dao Ancestors were born in the Void Heaven One Vein was all because Ye Tian, the son of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao, had obtained a large number of Dao treasures in the Infinite Abyss.

This secret was revealed, and all the forces suddenly came to their senses, and they also began to frantically invest in the power of the Infinite Abyss Fragments, constantly sending half-step True Ancestors in.

But they are destined not to be able to get too many Hedao treasures, and forcibly investing their strength will only suffer heavy losses.

Ye Tian didn't pay attention to these things anymore, he honestly retreated and cultivated to improve his cultivation.

His master, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, said that when his cultivation was raised to the extreme of a half-step True Ancestor, he would take him into the Dark Forbidden Realm to accept that amazing opportunity.

He was very curious and looking forward to this!
